commit_scope: Keep failed spec validation follow-ups in the spec lane so auto-heal does not create impl work before an active spec exists.

commands: git fetch origin main && git rebase --autostash origin/main

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Failed spec-validation tasks create respec follow-ups instead of impl heal tasks, reducing NO_SPEC_GATE retries caused by missing active specs.

Confirm impl_without_active_spec failures stop growing from spec-phase auto-heal follow-ups.
